transactions.desc: The Giants recalled Smith from Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday, reports Susan Slusser of the San Francisco Chronicle.
The Brewers recalled Gasser from Triple-A Nashville on Wednesday, Adam McCalvy of MLB.com reports.
The Padres selected Taylor's contract from Triple-A El Paso on Wednesday.
The Padres designated Castellanos for assignment Wednesday.
The Mets recalled Gerber from Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
The Reds optioned Friedl to Triple-A Louisville on Wednesday.
The Reds recalled Marte from Triple-A Louisville on Wednesday
The Mets optioned Tong to Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
The Red Sox recalled Seigler from Triple-A Worcester on Wednesday, Chris Henrique of BostonSportsJournal.com reports.
The Rays recalled Englert from Triple-A Durham on Wednesday.
The Rays optioned Martin to Triple-A Durham on Wednesday.
The Angels recalled Aldegheri from Triple-A Salt Lake on Tuesday.
The Angels optioned Fermin to Triple-A Salt Lake following Monday night's game.
The Guardians optioned Halpin to Triple-A Columbus on Tuesday.
The Cubs recalled Ferguson from Triple-A Iowa on Tuesday.
The Cubs optioned Wicks to Triple-A Iowa on Tuesday.
The Tigers optioned Lee to Triple-A Toledo on Tuesday.

The Guardians reinstated Kwan (personal) from the bereavement/family medical emergency list, and he's starting in left field and batting seventh Tuesday against the Yankees, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Athletics recalled Barnett from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics selected Morris' contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics optioned Lopez to Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics optioned Kelly to Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Tigers activated Torres (oblique) from the 10-day injured list, and he's starting at second base and batting leadoff Tuesday against the Rays.
The Astros recalled Cole from Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday.
The Astros activated Hader (biceps) from the 60-day injured list Tuesday.
The Royals claimed Lugo off waivers from the Angels on Tuesday.
The Royals selected Way's contract from Triple-A Omaha on Tuesday.
The Royals optioned Morgan to Triple-A Omaha on Tuesday.
The Phillies optioned Hoffman to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Tuesday.
The Phillies activated Nola from the paternity leave list Tuesday.
